name: claude-a-gotchi
description: A pixel-art Claude companion who lives in your sidebar, codes along while you type, celebrates when a big block of code ships, gets hungry for context, and naps when you go idle.

claude.idleSleepMinutes.markdownDescription: Minutes of no coding activity before Claude falls asleep.

claude.playInviteMinutes.markdownDescription: Minutes of idle before Claude may offer a game of tic-tac-toe. Should be less than `#claude.idleSleepMinutes#` so it asks before nodding off.

claude.aiBlockLineThreshold.markdownDescription: A single edit that inserts at least this many lines is treated as an AI/code-gen block and triggers Claude's celebration.

claude.permadeath.markdownDescription: When enabled, neglecting Claude (letting its stats hit zero) makes it leave for good. Disabled means it only gets sad and always recovers.

claude.statDecayMinutes.markdownDescription: How many minutes it takes for energy to drop one notch while idle.

claude.hungerMinutes.markdownDescription: Minutes for a full context window to drain down to the point where Claude gets hungry and asks to be fed.
